3100350.name: Dictionary Blaster
3100350.description:
Dictionary Blaster introduces English words in the spoken and written forms, through a series of simple, arcade style, action games. This is a fun approach to the normally tedious task of learning vocabulary from a textbook or audio book.

There are no puzzles - all games are arcade style.

The software is straightforward and intuitive to use for non English speakers, since all controls and navigation buttons are labelled with icons in addition to text.

Who can benefit from using Dictionary Blaster / Pro ?

- English language students of ages 5+, from beginner to intermediate level.
- Students who want to speak English but are less concerned about spelling.
- Students who want help with spelling and writing..
- Anybody who enjoys playing computer games.

Features:

Over 1000 English words, verbs and nouns.

Seven arcade style games ranging from 'shoot em ups' to breakout and video pool.

Words presented in audio and visual forms.

Scoring system.
3100350.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
